name: Pivot and Unpivot Data
description: Transform data between wide and long formats using pivot operations

config.sql:
SELECT 
  product,
  region,
  SUM(CASE WHEN month = 'Jan' THEN sales ELSE 0 END) as jan_sales,
  SUM(CASE WHEN month = 'Feb' THEN sales ELSE 0 END) as feb_sales,
  SUM(CASE WHEN month = 'Mar' THEN sales ELSE 0 END) as mar_sales,
  SUM(sales) as total_sales
FROM {{input}}
GROUP BY product, region
ORDER BY product, region

SELECT 
  product,
  region,
  'jan_sales' as metric_name,
  jan_sales as value
FROM {{input}}
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  product,
  region,
  'feb_sales' as metric_name,
  feb_sales as value
FROM {{input}}
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  product,
  region,
  'mar_sales' as metric_name,
  mar_sales as value
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY product, region

SELECT 
  product,
  region,
  metric_name,
  value,
  LAG(value, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY product, region ORDER BY metric_name) as prev_value,
  CASE 
    WHEN LAG(value, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY product, region ORDER BY metric_name) > 0 
    THEN ((value - LAG(value, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY product, region ORDER BY metric_name)) / 
         LAG(value, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY product, region ORDER BY metric_name)) * 100
    ELSE 0 
  END as growth_pct
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY product, region, metric_name
